title: USS Bougainville
summary:
USS Bougainville may refer to:

USS Bougainville (CVE-100) was a Casablanca-class escort carrier in service from 1944 to 1946
USS Bougainville (LHA-8) is a planned America-class amphibious assault ship expected to deliver in 2024
